CpsProgressCircularComponent.description: CpsProgressCircularComponent is a process status indicator in a form of a spinner.

props.description: Defines the input properties of the component.

values.name: diameter
values.description: Diameter of the progress bar, of type number denoting pixels or string.

values.name: strokeWidth
values.description: Thickness of the progress bar, of type number denoting pixels or string.

values.name: ariaLabel
values.description:
Accessible label announced by screen readers to describe what is loading.
Falls back to "Loading" when empty value is provided.
